# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.FalloffDistance property

The distance beyond the inner radius over which the sound fades from full volume to silence. The outer boundary equals [`InnerRadius`](./InnerRadius.md) + `FalloffDistance`.

```csharp
public float FalloffDistance { get; set; }
```
